prompt: Convert this continuous prose (no section headings) about pulmonary embolism imaging into Anki cloze and basic flashcards.

assertions.name: valid_cloze_syntax
assertions.description: All cloze cards use valid {{cN::...}} markup

assertions.name: covers_key_concepts
assertions.description: Covers CTPA, HU threshold, acute vs chronic findings, right heart strain signs

assertions.name: distribution_by_relevance
assertions.description: More cards on high-yield concepts, not evenly spread across all sentences
